po_corrections_to_v4: De Winton: Okotoks INCLUDED (v4 wrongly subtracted)
De Winton: polygon extended to target 1400-1700 km^2
Calgary-South: polygon expanded to target 15-25 km^2
Calgary-South: NW curve approximated instead of straight cut

po_additional_directives_addressed.contiguity: Every v5 polygon coalesced to a single Polygon; gap-closure via buffer(N).buffer(-N) at N in [100, 200, 300, 500] m documented in contiguity_ops_log.
po_additional_directives_addressed.overlay_verification: Side-by-side overlay panels rendered against maps/hires/v0_1_minority_p360_map74.png and p361_map75.png at v0_5_overlay_minority_*.png.
po_additional_directives_addressed.no_boundary_islands: simplify(tolerance=50 m) applied to each v5 polygon to remove spikes/spurs.
po_additional_directives_addressed.final_validation: Each v5 polygon checked for is_valid, single Polygon, interior-ring justification, and compactness ratio < 8; per-ED results in validation_log.

anchors.west_edge_anchor: North Saskatchewan River (OSM waterway, v3 inheritance)
anchors.north_edge_anchor: Whitemud Drive alignment with peninsula carve-out (2019 parent)
anchors.arm_extension_anchor: rectangular arm into Edmonton-South (visually transcribed from PO-painted reference)

pass_1_and_2_coarse_plus_feature_snap.notes: Pass 1 (init from v4 + coarse corrections) and Pass 2 (OSM feature snap for reserve/city/river/county) applied as a single build step; feature anchors come from osmnx fetches documented above.

west_river_edge.note: river-snapped via v3 inheritance; serrated boundary visible in panel

north_stepped_edge.note: partial stepped pattern captured via ESW north boundary intersection; peninsula carve-out not fully modelled

east_main_body_edge.note: ESW 2019 eastern boundary; commission may shift by 0.5-0.7 km

eastern_arm_presence.note: arm present and unioned with main body (structurally matches PO reference); arm east extent uncertain to +/- 1 km

south_edge.note: ESW southern boundary; Anthony Henday Drive as proxy; +/- 0.5 km

pass_5_interior_scrub.red_only_constraint: Pipeline uses vector OSM and 2019 parent polygons only; no raster-trace from thumbnails. Thus non-red interior lines (roads/rail/rivers drawn for reader orientation) cannot have been encoded as ED boundary.

anchors.south_edge_anchor: Livingstone-Macleod northern extent (10 km south of Highwood effective southern edge)
anchors.east_edge_anchor: Highwood 2019 eastern extent (roughly Foothills County east, OSM level=6)
anchors.subtracts_tsuutina: Tsuut'ina Nation 145 reserve + 200 m buffer (OSM aboriginal_lands)
anchors.subtracts_ed29_rural: narrow rectangle south of reserve (6 km south, reserve-bounded)
anchors.includes_okotoks: YES — Okotoks is inside De Winton at SE edge (v5 correction vs v4)
anchors.southward_extension: into Livingstone-Macleod 2019, ~10 km south of Highwood effective southern edge
